reviews.review_description:
I always support such ideas. Connecting soccer with boxing in real life doesn't make sense, but in VR is really good. The pitch has good size for VR, I was afraid that it would be a big stadium. Gameplay is smooth, sometimes ball bounces in weird directions but I suppose this happens if multiple players at once hits it. I can design my own team and also other teams in the game. I cannot grab the ball, but that's fine, I don't know how it would work in boxing gloves. 
I hope developer will not abandon this project as it feels very unique and suitable for VR.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for nice words. I hope everyone will like the game and we will be able to move to another level. Remember that if you have ideas, our Discord channel is waiting.

reviews.review_description:
I was going to write nice little game, but I was searching for rotation settings (I found it) and it turned out that game has tournament, league, training, some little arcade game, you can customize all players in all teams (body, face, names and numbers that are then reflected on the tshirts)
Everything can be customized, all aspects of gameplay, special effects, rules - literally for a gamer that wants to tune game for own needs it really cool.
I suggest playing standing with some room, as you would like to box all the time and opponents are moving.
Matches are dynamic, small stadium is perfect, there are two locations, one inside and second outside (where you can turn on/off rain with simple switch)

I give 4 stars because I found two small issues.
First is that when referee passes you the ball (and sometimes in other situations) you have to keep hands low, otherwise you can accidentaly hit the ball (I learned this during penalty). This is pretty simple to avoid, just keep hands low, like in boxing when opponent is away.
Second is that you can steal the ball by hitting opponent into the face. In easy level it's only single hit required, so that't not a problem. But on normal it's random 2-4 (according to instruction) and you don't know how many left. Moreover I'm 100% sure, that when you hit the ball and opponent catches it again, then the counter resets. It would be nice to have some kind of indicator, maybe a number over the head?
And I was thinking, that I can easily steal the ball in slow motion, but it's actually prevented - and that's very good, because people would use it to cheat.
What else? It seems builtin goalkeeper is better than me, but I switch to goalkeep just for fun.
Dev - fix the issues and I will change to 5 stars

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for reporting the issues. We will try to fix them ASAP.
